mnemonics: TCP: The Careful Postman (ensures reliable, ordered, and error-checked delivery of data packets)
keyPoints: Provides reliable, in-order delivery of data
Uses flow control and congestion control mechanisms
Operates at the transport layer of the OSI model
commonMistakes: Confusing TCP with UDP (connection-oriented vs. connectionless)
Assuming TCP guarantees speed (it prioritizes reliability over speed)
Forgetting that TCP headers are larger than UDP headers, adding overhead
